launch_note: Kasa smart-plug power cycling recovered the SC64 menu but did not launch the queued ROM. A physical N64 reset was required to launch the queued upload.
result: black screen through 60 seconds on real N64 after physical reset

post_test_state.rom_write: Disabled until the N64 is physically reset or power-cycled back to the menu

conclusion: The real-hardware failure is inside the H VI-register family. Split H into origin/control-flow, width/vsync, and scale probes next.
